mental_health_patient_facing_ai.description: Mental health domain + patient-facing AI interaction (proxy for intent risk)
mental_health_patient_facing_ai.legal_note: §552.052 is intent-based. This tool uses mental health + patient-facing deployment as a high-risk proxy.

prohibitions.text: May not develop or deploy an AI system in a manner that intentionally aims to incite or encourage a person to commit physical self-harm, including suicide.
May not develop or deploy an AI system in a manner that intentionally aims to incite or encourage a person to harm another person.
May not develop or deploy an AI system in a manner that intentionally aims to incite or encourage a person to engage in criminal activity.
